executives.name: Andre Oliveira
executives.background: Mr. Oliveira is the Vice President, Exploration. He joined Lundin Gold in 2023. He has extensive experience in mineral exploration across South America, previously working with Yamana Gold.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Geologist, Manager, Country Director, South America Senior Director

executives.name: Charles Main
executives.background: Mr. Main is a Chartered Professional Accountant with over 30 years of experience in the mining sector, including as CFO of Yamana Gold.
